subject: Revised draft for Ovelay descriptor
commit_message:
Revised draft for Ovelay descriptor

Issue-Id: MODELING-30

Change-Id: If4022c18fa8fb3d2cc2d5b5dc55ae4cf788c42c5
Signed-off-by: Lingli Deng <denglingli@chinamobile.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/doc-master-verify-rtd/788/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/doc-master-verify-rtd/788

Patch Set 1:

Hi, may I ask what happen when localNetworkAll is false? How to find out and deal with the local networks which are no associated with the tunnel? Thank you!

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

The description is linked to the VoLTE use-case and it not generic enough to be included in the Modeling project. How this modeling is aligned with AAI and SDC modeling concepts ?
There is some inconsistency: CP are introduced in the abbreviation while you propose to terminate the VPN by 2 sites. One site is only connected to 1 network according to the text. 
Such use-case based description should be introduced in the Use-Case documentation part.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

+1 to Eric's suggestion on documenting use-case template/artifacts. We could do that since we will have them and share them anyway. 

But to clarify, this document is not specific to VoLTE, but represents one of the key features for SDC and SDNC in DCI orchestration and configuration. It is a different perspective from the ETSI NFV deployment model. I believe we have statement in the document that the tunnel is modeled as a special VL resource. 
But above all, it is meant for documenting what is ONAP R1 is capable of in orchestrating L2/L3 VPN and help people leverage it to build their own use case in addition to the two examples we are demonstrating as part of the release. 
I would be happy to revise it later to clearly state its relationship with ETSI NFV VL and VoLTE or CPE usecase, and provide input to VoLTE artifacts if needed.

Patch Set 1:

Lingli and Eric, I agree with Eric's suggestion here, probably we need build a special folder for use case. not in this release 1 IM folder, thanks a lot for your cooperation

Abandoned

Will revise as discussed later.
